name: Almond Granola Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Melt butter in a 13 x 9 x 2-inch pan in the heated oven.
3. Sprinkle granola over melted butter and bake for 10 minutes.
4. Remove the pan from the oven and sprinkle chocolate chips, almonds, and coconut over the granola mixture.
5. Pour sweetened condensed milk evenly on top.
6. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes.
7. Cool. Cut into squares.
